metadata.title: Ankhnii Nakhia | Pharmacy & Pharmaceutical Supplier
metadata.description: Ankhnii Nakhia LLC - Importing, supplying and selling pharmaceuticals and medical equipment since 2007.

hero.titleLine1: A Trusted Partner in Mongolia's Healthcare Sector
hero.description: Ankhnii Nakhia LLC was established in 2007 in pharmaceutical importing, supply, sales, agriculture, and foreign trade. Today we operate a Pharmaceutical Distribution Center, 6 branch pharmacies, and Az Children's Hospital with over 40 employees, serving continuously for 19 years.

companyIntro.title: Ankhnii Nakhia LLC
companyIntro.description: Ankhnii Nakhia LLC was established in 2007 in pharmaceutical importing, supply, sales, agriculture, and foreign trade. Today we operate a Pharmaceutical Distribution Center, 6 branch pharmacies, and Az Children's Hospital with over 40 employees, serving continuously for 19 years.

quality.title: Quality Products & Service
quality.desc: We supply high-quality medicines and medical supplies, implementing international standards and introducing the latest technologies and innovations.

affordability.title: Affordable Pricing
affordability.desc: By working directly with manufacturers, we maintain competitive pricing policies to ensure medicines and medical supplies remain accessible and affordable.

reliability.title: Fast & Reliable Service

about.heroDescription: Ankhnii Nakhia LLC was established in 2007 in pharmaceutical importing, supply, and sales. Today we operate a Pharmaceutical Distribution Center, 6 branch pharmacies, and Az Children's Hospital with over 40 employees, serving continuously for 19 years.

ceoMessage.title: CEO's Message
ceoMessage.name: Kh. Sarnai
ceoMessage.p1: On behalf of the entire team at Ankhnii Nakhia LLC, which has been delivering pharmaceutical care services continuously for 19 years while prioritizing the health of our people, I would like to express my sincere gratitude to all our valued customers and partners.
ceoMessage.p2: Since our establishment, we have been committed to providing quality, safe, and accessible medicines, medical products, and services to our citizens. Together with our skilled, experienced team and trusted partner organizations, we continue to contribute to the development of the healthcare sector while upholding quality standards.
ceoMessage.p3: Going forward, we will continue to expand our pharmaceutical supply, pharmacy, and healthcare service activities, working tirelessly to deliver even more reliable and quality services to our customers and partner organizations.
ceoMessage.p4: In this era of rapid innovation, information technology, and digital transformation, we are confident that by embracing new opportunities, we will continue to grow together and make a tangible contribution to the development of the sector.
ceoMessage.p5: Your trust and support are the most important factors in our growth and progress. We express our deep gratitude to all partner organizations, clients, and customers who place their trust in our company.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Our mission is to provide safe, quality-assured medicines and medical supplies to healthcare organizations and the public continuously and equitably, delivering pharmaceutical care services.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: Our vision is to become Mongolia's leading trusted partner in the healthcare sector, introducing the best practices, new technologies, and innovations from the global pharmaceutical industry to deliver accessible, quality services to citizens.

valuesSection.title: Values
valuesSection.description: We prioritize quality in our operations, value the trust of our partners and customers, approach healthcare responsibly, embrace innovation and new technologies, and strive for continuous and reliable operations.

socialResponsibility.title: Social Responsibility
socialResponsibility.p1: We always prioritize learning and development. Our team actively participates in conferences, seminars, training sessions, and stays updated with the latest industry news, sharing knowledge and experience with others.
socialResponsibility.p1b: Our social responsibility policy is focused not only on advancing our own knowledge, but also on preparing a new generation of professionals who will contribute to the future development of the industry. In this way, we strengthen our values and responsibility not only through our operations, but also through the positive impact we have on society.
socialResponsibility.p2: We work closely with local communities, listening to their needs, opinions, and feedback.
socialResponsibility.p3: We also actively participate in district and community parades, community events, and sponsorship activities, representing our company and building strong relationships with citizens.

history.title: Company Introduction
history.p1: Ankhnii Nakhia LLC was first established in 2007 in the pharmacy sector. From April 7, 2017, we obtained a special license for supplying medicines, medical instruments, equipment, and accessories, successfully expanding our operations across Mongolia with quality-assured, safe medicines and medical supplies.
history.p2: Today, the company operates a pharmaceutical distribution center, 6 branch pharmacies, and a children's hospital, with over 40 employees, successfully operating for 19 years.
history.p3: The company's founder and CEO, Kh. Sarnai, is a qualified pharmacist with over 20 years of professional experience. Under her leadership, the team consistently upholds quality and reliability through their highly skilled and experienced professionals.
history.p4: Going forward, Ankhnii Nakhia LLC aims to introduce world-class pharmaceutical best practices, new technologies, and innovations across all its branches, delivering quality and accessible medicines and medical services to the public.

distributionCenter.title: Pharmaceutical Distribution Center
distributionCenter.desc: Since April 7, 2017, Ankhnii Nakhia LLC has been operating under a special license to supply medicines, medical instruments, equipment, and accessories in Khan-Uul District with 10 employees.

pharmacy.title: Pharmacy
pharmacy.desc: Starting from 2007, our pharmacy has expanded to 6 branches with over 20 staff, providing Health Insurance discounted services to family clinics and citizens, contributing to public health.

childrenHospital.title: Children's Hospital
childrenHospital.desc: Az Children's Hospital is a branch unit focused on delivering quality healthcare services for children.

pharmacyNetwork.title: Pharmacy Network
pharmacyNetwork.desc: Since 2009, serving family clinics and citizens with safe, quality medicines at Health Insurance discounted prices across 6 branch pharmacies.

supplyService.title: Pharmaceutical Supply
supplyService.desc: Since 2017, supplying medicines, medical instruments, equipment, and accessories under special license.

import.title: Medicine Import
import.desc: Importing over 10 types of medicines registered in Mongolia's pharmaceutical registry from reputable manufacturers in Russia and Vietnam.

quality.title: Quality Standards
quality.desc: Following the MNS5260:2015 standard, serving with medicines registered in Mongolia's pharmaceutical registry that meet safety and quality requirements.

pharmacyPage.heading: Pharmacy
pharmacyPage.p1: Starting from 2007, our pharmacy has expanded to 6 branches with over 20 staff, providing Health Insurance discounted services to family clinics and citizens, contributing to public health protection.
pharmacyPage.p2: We follow the MNS5260:2015 pharmacy structure and operations standard, serving with medicines registered in Mongolia's pharmaceutical registry that meet safety and quality requirements, promoting rational medicine use among citizens.
pharmacyPage.goalText: To provide safe, quality-assured medicines and medical supplies to healthcare organizations and the public continuously and equitably, delivering pharmaceutical care services.

distributionPage.heading: "Ankhnii Nakhia" Pharmaceutical Distribution Center
distributionPage.p1: Since April 7, 2017, Ankhnii Nakhia LLC has been operating under a special license to supply medicines, medical instruments, equipment, and accessories in Khan-Uul District with 10 employees.
distributionPage.p2: Today, we import and sell over 10 types of medicines registered in Mongolia's pharmaceutical registry from reputable manufacturers in Russia and Vietnam.
distributionPage.goalText: To conduct pharmaceutical supply activities at the highest quality level while fully implementing all laws and regulations.
distributionPage.objectiveText: Going forward, we aim to supply quality medicines, medical instruments, equipment, and accessories from highly developed countries such as Austria, Germany, Poland, the USA, Australia, and South Korea to our citizens.

childrenHospitalPage.heading: "Az" Children's Hospital
childrenHospitalPage.p1: "Az" Children's Hospital has been operating since 2017, working continuously to make a tangible contribution to protecting children's health. The hospital focuses on providing quality, safe, and accessible services that meet various children's healthcare needs, employing highly skilled medical professionals and introducing modern equipment and new technologies.
childrenHospitalPage.p2: The hospital not only provides medical treatment but also organizes various initiatives aimed at providing preventive knowledge, advice, and information to children and parents, and promoting healthy lifestyle habits.
childrenHospitalPage.p3: Thus, "Az" Children's Hospital makes a valuable contribution to society in protecting children's health and supporting their development.
